best.explanation: Lagide looks like a clean fun-sized window for Fun progression, Medium confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 109 kJ, 12 s period, workable consistency 51/100, and good wind at 12 km/h.  A dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides; this is best for clean, playful walls when the bigger beaches are too wild or too small.  Expect: it can get busy, and it is usually more flow than heavy barrel.
best.shortExplanation: Lagide is a dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides · label Fun progression, Medium confidence · 0.6-0.9 m · 109 kJ · 12 s period · good wind at 12 km/h.

ranked.explanation: Belgas looks like a fun-sized north coast window for Rare window, Medium confidence: 0.6-1.1 m, 177 kJ, 12 s period, workable consistency 53/100, and wind is the main risk.  An open beach break where the sandbanks decide everything; this is best for quiet, punchy peaks when Lagide is too small, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Watch: wind angle is poor for this spot.

ranked.explanation: Almagreira looks like a clean fun-sized north coast window for Rare window, Medium confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 94 kJ, 13 s period, workable consistency 52/100, and good wind at 5 km/h.  An exposed north-coast beach break with more raw swell than Baleal; this is best for small, clean north-coast days when protected spots look underpowered, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Expect: banks, rips and wind exposure decide whether it is magic or messy.
ranked.shortExplanation: Almagreira is an exposed north-coast beach break with more raw swell than Baleal · label Rare window, Medium confidence · 0.6-0.9 m · 94 kJ · 13 s period · good wind at 5 km/h.

ranked.explanation: Cerro looks like a fun-sized window for Worth checking, High confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 91 kJ, 12 s period, workable consistency 54/100, and wind is not fully clear.  A sheltered beachbreak with gentle lefts and rights, somewhat similar to Cantinho but less consistent; this is best for manageable bodyboard waves when north-northwest swell reaches the bay with clean southerly wind.  Expect: it can feel softer or less defined than the main peaks, and rocks may appear closer to the west cliffs.
ranked.shortExplanation: Cerro is a sheltered beachbreak with gentle lefts and rights, somewhat similar to Cantinho but less consistent · label Worth checking, High confidence · 0.6-0.9 m · 91 kJ · 12 s period · wind is not fully clear.
